description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master branch and tags starting with 'v', and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, macOS-10.15) and architectures (x64, x86 on Windows). For each job, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, configure and build the project using cmake, run tests with ctest, package with cpack, build a Python wrapper, and upload build artifacts and release assets.
